description: A photograph depicting a hillside densely covered with green sclerophyllous scrub vegetation, potentially representative of maquis, garrigue, or phrygana, under a bright sky. The vegetation varies in height and density across the slope, with some areas appearing more bushy and others more herbaceous. The image is sourced from the European Environment Agency (EEA), indicated by "© EEA" in the bottom left corner. A file path "2012-2018_Nomenclature_Guideline_v1-media" is also visible.
